> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add addyosmani/web-quality-skills --skill web-quality-audit --skill accessibility --skill seo --skill performance --skill core-web-vitals --skill best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/web-quality-audit`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/web-quality-audit.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add addyosmani/web-quality-skills --skill web-quality-audit --skill accessibility --skill seo --skill performance --skill core-web-vitals --skill best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Comprehensive quality review orchestrator across Performance, Accessibility, SEO, Best Practices, and Core Web Vitals. Uses Lighthouse guidelines. Triggered by phrases like "audit my site", "lighthouse audit". Checks 50+ perf patterns, 40+ a11y rules, 30+ SEO reqs, 20+ security/best-practice patterns + all CWV. Recommended when unsure which sub-area to target or for full-site audits.

## Install Prerequisites

`npx skills add addyosmani/web-quality-skills --skill web-quality-audit --skill accessibility --skill seo --skill performance --skill core-web-vitals --skill best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode. status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named (group install supports multiple). Supports Claude plugin, Codex marketplace, Gemini extensions, manual copy.`

## Upstream Maintainer

addyosmani (github.com/addyosmani/web-quality-skills). MIT License. Insights from Chrome DevTools team, web perf experts, a11y advocates. 2.4k stars, 216 forks. Resources link to Lighthouse, web.dev, WCAG, Agent Skills spec.

## Comparable Alternatives

Other skills in same bundle (e.g. performance, core-web-vitals, accessibility, seo, best-practices); general Lighthouse/web.dev guidance; framework-specific perf/a11y plugins; other curated quality skills like chrome-devtools-*.

&gt; Web-augmented research; evidence only, not authority. Config in external-skills.md is authoritative for install.
